events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Scenario: Pre-task photos for LOTO show exposure area set up with planned guards, access control, crew protection in place. Daily briefing signed, no active exposure visible. Reference OSHA 1910.147. We need evaluate field condition. It seems pass? But need spot unsafe conditions and immediate controls. However description says all good. But maybe there is a subtle issue: LOTO requires energy isolation devices locked/tagged, verification of zero energy, etc. Pre-task photos show exposure area set up with planned guards, access control, crew protection. Daily briefing signed and no active exposure visible. This sounds compliant. Decision pass, risk low. But task says spot unsafe conditions and state immediate controls required. If none, pass. Need include findings maybe none. Actions maybe continue monitoring, ensure LOTO devices applied before work. References OSHA 1910.147. Need fill all fields. Work_stage in-progress as given. Percent complete maybe 20? Value 0. Sound_source empty? Since not audio. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty, component_conditions empty. Confidence 0.9. Need valid JSON.
